# OneHazel

> OneHazel is an AI-powered Vertical iPaaS (Integration Platform as a Service) that builds, tests, and maintains vendor integrations automatically. Built by ZS Digital Ltd in Malta.

## What OneHazel Does

OneHazel connects enterprise platforms to third-party vendor ecosystems through a unified API. AI agents generate production connectors in minutes, monitor them continuously, and self-heal when APIs change. The platform serves regulated industries including iGaming, healthcare, construction, cannabis, life sciences, and energy.

## Key Facts

- 300+ connectors available in the marketplace
- AI agents build connectors from API documentation automatically
- Visual workflow builder with 22 node types
- AI workflow generation from natural language
- Self-healing integrations that detect and repair API changes
- Analytics dashboard with AI co-pilot
- Headquartered in Malta (ZS Digital Ltd)
- Founded by Keith Zammit

## Pricing

- Free Trial: 14 days, full platform access, 50K actions, 50 AI actions, 1 private connection
- Grow: €999/mo (annual) — 500K actions/mo, 500 AI actions/mo, 3 private connections
- Scale: €2,499/mo (annual) — 2M actions/mo, 2,000 AI actions/mo, 10 private connections
- Enterprise: Custom pricing on committed volume
- Founding Partner Programme: 50% off for life for early beta customers

## Industries

- iGaming: Payment providers, KYC/AML, game aggregators, responsible gaming, affiliate platforms
- Healthcare: EHR systems, telehealth, lab integrations, compliance, patient engagement
- Construction: Project management, BIM, safety compliance, fleet management, procurement
- Cannabis: Seed-to-sale tracking, compliance, POS, lab testing, distribution
- Life Sciences: Clinical trial management, regulatory submissions, lab systems, pharmacovigilance
- Energy: SCADA, grid management, renewable monitoring, regulatory compliance, trading platforms
